title: DIGs instructed to use minimum force at filling stations
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); All Senior DIGs have been instructed to use minimum force if a situation arises where police officers fail to control individuals who behave in a violent manner at filling stations, and protests.

Secretary to the Ministry of Public Security S. Hettiarachchi said that a discussion was held with Minister Tiran Alles regarding the use of minimum force, and thereafter the directive was issued to the DIGs.
He said that incidents of certain individual attempting to take control of filling station operations have been reported from various parts of the country.
10-hour water cut for Kotte from Saturday (25) night to Sunday (26) morning
